provider-install.request_description: An installation request was sent to the organization's owner. They'll receive a notification and can approve access to repositories.
provider-install.auth_description: We are finishing authentication with {provider}. This window will close automatically when complete.
provider-install.manual_close_hint: If this window doesn't close, you can safely close it manually.

github_integration.title: Connect your GitHub account
github_integration.description: Sitepins needs access to create branches and sync content for your projects.
github_integration.grant_access_link: I won't grant access to all repositories
github_integration.selective_desc1: If you choose selective repository access, we won't be able to automatically create repository for you.
github_integration.selective_desc2: No worries! You can still get started manually by following these steps:
github_integration.step_push: Push the source code to your GitHub repository.
github_integration.step_new_site: Click the + New Site button from the top right.
github_integration.step_grant_access: Select GitHub and grant access to your repository.
github_integration.step_grant_forked: Select GitHub and grant access to only your forked repository.
github_integration.step_final: Fill necessary details and press Create Site.
github_integration.revoke_access: Access can be revoked anytime in GitHub settings
